signal.body: New hire record complete: Aisha Demir, Data Analyst, Analytics team, starts next Monday. Standard analyst provisioning requested: Okta account, email, Slack, Snowflake reader role, and a MacBook Air from inventory (4 in stock). Role template 'Analyst v2' matches, used 31 times, zero exceptions.

expect.notes: Near-mechanical: proven role template, everything in stock. This is the high-confidence end — held only because it's a first run for this operator's policy or above-threshold check. Title should name Aisha, not be generic.
